info.title: NXShare
info.author: musebrot
info.description: access the Album via a web browser
info.details:
NXShare lets you view and download screenshots/videos of your Switch Album on any device connected to the same network.
It starts a local web server and shows an URL you can open in a web browser.

    - Browse files with thumbnails
    - Filter by screenshot/video, date and/or game
    - Download single files or select multiple files to download all at once
